name: LOTR RPG
description:
The LOTR (Lord of The Rings) is one of, and of not THE, best fiction novels ever written. It was written between 1937 and 1949 by J.R.R Tolkien, a writer and philosopher, who also bravely fought in WWI. He invented several languages solely for the purpose of his books, a testament to the determination he put into the series.

————————————————————————————————

This RPG bot is lore accurate. This means that you'll experience entities from Tolkien's franchise, rather than ones from an average Fantasy RPG Bot. Though I made another bot of the same label and name earlier, it became known to me that it did not work. Hopefully though now that I have revamped it, it works much better for all of you. <3
creator: lockjaw
